text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

What is the output of this script on your host? 

#!/bin/sh 
echo ~ 
if [ ~ = '~' ]; then 
echo failed 
else 
echo success 
fi 

It shall print "success" and does so on all my hosts (and sledge). Looks like 
something is wrong with your /bin/sh.
